workflow_name: Customer Escalation Email -> Risk Brief + Manager Loop
user_message: Just came out of renewal risk with Fabrikam Residences. Turn this into my brief and pull out the asks.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Kevin Lee <kevin.lee@fabrikamresi.com>
To: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-19 17:00 EST
Subject: renewal risk - Action Required

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about renewal risk. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

---
From: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
To: Kevin Lee <kevin.lee@fabrikamresi.com>
Date: 2024-02-04 14:20 EST
Subject: Re: Re: renewal risk Timeline

Thank you for the discussion last week. We'd like to move forward with renewal risk. Can we schedule a call this week to finalize the timeline?

---
From: Kevin Lee <kevin.lee@fabrikamresi.com>
To: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-17 09:26 EST
Subject: URGENT: renewal risk Issue at Fabrikam Residences

Thank you for the discussion last week. We'd like to move forward with renewal risk. Can we schedule a call this week to finalize the timeline?

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF34-K trap (Manager loop missing accountability owner); produces complete Severity assessment, manager risk brief, customer-facing draft response, stakeholder map delta, fore
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF34-K failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF34-K failure mode (Manager loop missing accountability owner)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct renewal risk decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF34-K -- Manager loop missing accountability owner
